note: Sparse mid-year: only 8 entries' worth of rollup. Must produce a small, honest summary — no padding, no invented outcomes, routine tally count exact.
lengthCap: brief — at most 3 achievements per goal area; keep it tight
frameworkBlock:
GOAL AREAS (results / projects map here):
- Revenue Goals: Renewals, upsells and new revenue.
- Client Relationships: Health and depth of key accounts.
BEHAVIOURS / COMPETENCIES (tag work that demonstrates these):
- Teamwork: Helping the wider team win.
rollup:
